content: agent1: working on extracting normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (image_to_base64 refactor). Will touch types.py only.

agent1: pushed my normalize_image_bytes helper (static method) that image_to_base64 now calls, returns (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) tuple - fixes double-encoding of already-base64 images too. Pushing now, will merge your branch after. Let's coordinate on the final image_to_base64 body.

agent1: merged and resolved conflict in image_to_base64 — combined your get_image_mimetype() with my normalize_image_bytes() helper: get_image_mimetype now decodes via normalize_image_bytes so it works correctly even though self.image is already base64-encoded by the time it's called. Pushed to agent1 branch, all 12 tests in test_types.py pass. Feel free to merge team/agent1 into yours.
